data.name: Ass Sniffing Simulator
data.detailed_description:
\

逼真的聲音和效果營造出完全的臨場幻覺，讓您忘卻自己身在遊戲中。這不只是娛樂，而是對您的神經、耐力和自制力的真正考驗。這裡的每個動作都是邁向新感受的一步，將測試您是否準備好面對完全不尋常的事情。您能一路走到最後，並保持冷靜嗎？準備好迎接史詩般的終局吧，這將是這次非凡體驗的高潮，也是對您勇氣的真正考驗。

本專案不只是遊戲，而是對傳統遊戲概念的挑戰。在這裡，您將找到其他遊戲中難以找到的獨特體驗。風險自負 - 證明您能接受挑戰，並能承受前方的一切。您準備好了嗎？

特色：
完全模擬聲音和效果： 最大程度地融入遊戲氛圍。
簡單但令人上癮的遊戲玩法： 讓您從第一分鐘迷到最後一分鐘。
讓您驚喜的結局： 即使是最有經驗的玩家也會對結局印象深刻。

警告：[/b］本遊戲包含成人主題，並非適合所有人。如果您還沒準備好接受出格的事物，這可能不是您的選擇。

data.short_description: 歡迎來到 Ass Sniffing Simulator 遊戲 - 在這款遊戲中，每個動作都是對您耐力和毅力的真正考驗。本遊戲沒有複雜的關卡，也沒有不斷增加的難度 - 只有您和源源不絕的意想不到的感覺。
data.supported_languages:
英文*, 法文, 義大利文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 保加利亞文, 匈牙利文, 希臘文, 丹麥文, 印尼語, 簡體中文, 韓文, 荷蘭文, 挪威文, 波蘭文, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙, 羅馬尼亞文, 俄文, 土耳其文, 烏克蘭文, 芬蘭文, 捷克文, 瑞典文, 日文
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 (only 64-bit) or Windows 10 (only 64-bit)
  • 處理器: 3.0 Ghz (2 Core)
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: nVidia GeForce GTX 1060 / AMD Radeon RX 570
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 (only 64-bit) or Windows 10 (only 64-bit)
  • 處理器: 3.33 Ghz (4 Core)
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: nVidia GeForce RTX 2060 / AMD Radeon RX 5600 XT
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間

data.name: Ass Sniffing Simulator
data.detailed_description:
Realistic sounds and effects create a complete illusion of presence, making you forget you are in the game. This is not just entertainment, but a real test of your nerves, stamina and self-control. Every action here is a step towards new sensations that will test how ready you are to face something completely out of the ordinary. Will you be able to go all the way to the end and keep your cool? Get ready for the epic finale that will be the culmination of this extraordinary experience and a true test of your courage.

This project is not just a game, but a challenge to traditional notions of what a game should be. Here you will find a unique experience that is hard to find in other games. At your own risk - prove that you are up to the challenge and can withstand all that lies ahead. Are you ready?

Features:
Full simulation of sounds and effects: Maximum immersion into the atmosphere of the game.
Simple but addictive gameplay: Keeps you hooked from the first minute to the last.
An ending that will surprise you: Even the most experienced players will be impressed by the ending.

Warning:
The game contains adult themes and is not suitable for everyone. If you're not ready for something out of the ordinary, this may not be your choice.

data.short_description: Welcome to Ass Sniffing Simulator - a game where every action becomes a true test of your endurance and stamina. There are no complicated levels or increasing difficulty - just you and a steady stream of unexpected sensations.
data.supported_languages:
English*, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Bulgarian, Hungarian, Greek, Danish, Indonesian, Simplified Chinese, Korean, Dutch, Norwegian, Polish, Portuguese - Portugal, Romanian, Russian, Turkish, Ukrainian, Finnish, Czech, Swedish, Japanese
*languages with full audio support

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS *: Windows 7 (only 64-bit) or Windows 10 (only 64-bit)
  • Processor: 3.0 Ghz (2 Core)
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
  • Graphics: nVidia GeForce GTX 1060 / AMD Radeon RX 570
  • DirectX: Version 11
  • Storage: 1 GB available space

  • OS *: Windows 7 (only 64-bit) or Windows 10 (only 64-bit)
  • Processor: 3.33 Ghz (4 Core)
  • Memory: 8 GB RAM
  • Graphics: nVidia GeForce RTX 2060 / AMD Radeon RX 5600 XT
  • DirectX: Version 11
